arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer major injury blow just TEN days before Europa League final against Man United as star limps off in Crystal Palace defeat
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou 's side beat Bodo/Glimt 5-1 on aggregate in the semi-finals, and play in Bilbao on May 21 in search of their first European trophy since they won the UEFA Cup in 1984.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 0-2 Crystal Palace: Player ratings as much-changed Spurs downed by Eze brace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace cruised to victory over Tottenham Hotspur 2-0, earning their first win at their London foes since 1997 and first-ever league double.

arts.ttl: Eberechi Eze bags brace as Tottenham brought back down to earth in Palace defeat
arts.sum: Spurs slipped to a 20th defeat of their Premier League campaign – their worst tally of losses in the division.

arts.ttl: Why Palace Goal Vs Spurs Was Ruled Out for Offside Despite Mateta Being in Own Half
arts.sum: An explanation has been given as to why Ismaila Sarr's goal for Crystal Palace was ruled out for offside against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer huge injury scare before Europa League final as key attacker taken off against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are dealt another potentially devastating injury blow ahead of the Europa League final, as Dejan Kulusevski comes off against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest v Leicester, Manchester United v West Ham and more: Premier League – live

The goal would be his 200th for Leicester and it would be fitting as the striker is leaving the club at the end of the season. Nott’m Forest v Leicester Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Chelsea and El Clásico headline crucial set of games – matchday live
arts.sum: Follow all the latest news and buildup to Sunday’s games Live scores | Tables | And mail matchday live or post BTL Napoli are three wins away from only the fourth Scudetto in their history. But the relationship between fanbase and manager feels coldly transactional. Assessing Antonio Conte is difficult. On the one hand, his career has been a story of consistent success. If Napoli do win Serie A it will be his sixth league title with four clubs in two countries in 13 years, a period in which he also transformed an unremarkable Italy into a dynamic side who beat Spain at Euro 2016 before going out to Germany in an 18-penalty shootout. On the other, it’s a tale of strife and constant tension. For club directors, he is a permanent migraine. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major injury boost ahead of Europa League final run-in - with Spurs star set to return to action against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been forced to deal with several injury headaches this season and his side have slumped down to 16th in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Tottenham captain Son Heung-min could return for Palace clash – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Son Heung-min has not played for Tottenham since April 10.
